positive: A stylized, modern illustration of a whimsical forest gathering. Focus on deep emerald greens, forest blues, and earthy ochres. The scene features various clean silhouettes of stylized mushrooms, delicate ferns, stylized woodland animals (such as foxes and deer), and flowing ribbons of moss. The composition is centered and vertically balanced, with elements arranged around a strong focal point. Use linework, vector art style, high contrast, and solid color blocks. Studio quality illustration, designed for repeating print pattern or central apparel graphic. Flat design principles, perfect symmetry, vibrant digital painting style.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, signature, low detail, poor anatomy, jpeg artifacts, noise, out of frame, messy composition, logos, trademarks, blurry background, hyperrealistic
